heading: 1 Introduction
text:
clusteR R package assists
epidemiologists (data scientists analysts …) local, regional, 
state health departments managing cluster-sampled cohort survey similar 
CDC’s CASPER.

heading: 1.1 What clusteR can do
text:
short, clusteR built give epidemiologists framework manage 
analyze cluster-sampled cohort survey. clusteR built handle data
management tasks epidemiologists don’t need rely difficult--
maintain (nearly impossible share) set custom scripts.clusteR can:Given information state county/counties interest, randomly
select U.S. Census blocks participation display simple maps.Standardize, manage, update, export cohort file key data 
status information participants.Export PDF CSV lists contact participants via mail, phone, email.Filter groups aggregate status participants, group selected clusters
(proximity), produce customizable walk lists door--door interviews.Produce reports completion cohort.Establish data connection, retrieve data, standardize .Customizably clean weight standardized data.Produce analytic reports weighted unweighted responses.Export cohort data, raw cleaned data, analytic products.clusteR :Replace trained epidemiologist.Obtain random sample participants addresses clusters interest,
even clusteR selects U.S. Census blocks .Build, maintain, host survey platform.Build, maintain, host dashboard web platform.Host cohort files survey data collaboration.Secure cohort files survey data.

heading: 3.5.1 Required fields
text:
clusteR requires certain fields cohort file. :ID: unique identifier, can format.Cluster: identifier cluster participant .Name: participant’s name, defaults “Current Resident”.Mailing: participant’s mailing street address.Physical: participant’s mailing address residence,
participant’s actual street address residence.City: city mailing address.State: state mailing address.ZIP: ZIP code mailing address.Phone: participant’s phone number.Email: participant’s email address.Consent: participant’s consent status (“Yes”, “”, “Unknown”,
“contact”, NA), defaulting NA.Status: participant’s completion status enrollment information,
automatically determined.fields can formatted however like, Consent picky.
must use following options:Yes: participant participated consented surveyed.: participant participated refused consent 
surveyed.Unknown: participant participated, return consent.contact: participant wishes removed cohort; 
optional “” can used instead.NA: system default, used prospective
participant yet reached.update_cohort throw error anything options 
used. Alchemer survey (, importantly, CSV file), can enter
key setup_get_alc convert responses .

heading: 6.1 view_topline
text:
primary function calculate view survey results. 
automatically combines columns, calculates frequency answer, 
applies weights survey responses, generates report results.view_topline requires codebook argument, string
representing file path key survey questions. file must 
tab-delimited include QN column containing question numbers
corresponding columns cleaned data type column specifying 
question type. type may :mc: Multiple-choice, select one answer per questionms: Multiple-select, select many answers apply per questionno: Numeric, provide numerical answer questionft: Free-text, provide free-text answer question (usually
categorized coded like multiple-select question cleaning)Without specifying arguments, view_topline generates simple PDF report
based recent cleaned data without weighting. behavior can 
altered following:data can set different file path use different datamake can changed “csv” produce tidy spreadsheettemplate can changed path .Rmd file customize report
produced; starter template available custom_toplinewt can set apply survey weights, must numeric variable 
survey dataexclude can set character vector questions exclude 
weighting, demographic variables; exclude questions 
report, can accomplished excluding codebook file

name stratification variable string. Results tables report 
additional column left representing demographic variable.
variable must already exist survey data.starter custom template available custom_breakdown.
